lesson.menu_title: Hello, I am Maísa -- Introducing Yourself with Confidence
lesson.menu_desc: Reading + WH questions and "This is..." -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Hello, I am Maísa -- Introducing Yourself with Confidence in Any Room
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 2 -- Introducing Yourself

reading.rtitle: A New Face at the Monday Meeting
paras: It is Monday morning. Maísa is at a big meeting. There are eight people in the room. The manager, Sarah, smiles and says: "Welcome, Maísa! This is the finance team."
Maísa is a little nervous, but she is ready. She stands up and speaks. "Hello, everyone. My name is Maísa. I am from São Paulo. I am on the finance team. It is a pleasure to be here."
David, the partner from Canada, asks: "Where are you from, Maísa? And how are you today?" "I am from São Paulo, and I am great, thank you," she answers.
Then Maísa introduces her colleague. "David, this is Paula. She is my colleague. Paula is our data analyst." David smiles: "Pleased to meet you, Paula. Welcome to the team, both of you!"

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: Maísa is alone in the room and says nothing to the team.
At her first meeting, Maísa introduces herself and her colleague Paula, and the team welcomes them.
David is the new analyst and Maísa is the manager of the team.

items: Maísa is nervous, but she introduces herself to the team.
She is a little nervous, but she stands up and says her name, city and team.
Sarah is the partner from Canada.
Sarah is the manager; David is the partner from Canada.
Maísa introduces her colleague Paula to David.
She says: "David, this is Paula. She is my colleague."
David is unfriendly and does not welcome them.
David says "Pleased to meet you" and "Welcome to the team."

listenings.text: Hi, everyone. My name is David. I am the new partner at the company. I am from Canada, but now I am in Sao Paulo. I am very happy to be here with the finance team. This is my first week. I want to meet everyone. So please, come and say hello. Tell me your name and what you do. How are you today? I am great, and I am ready to work with you. Welcome to a new year for our team!

Good morning, everyone, and welcome. My name is Sarah. I am the manager of the finance team. Today we have a new colleague with us. Her name is Maisa, and she is from Sao Paulo. Please make her feel welcome. This is a friendly team, and we help each other every day. If you are new, do not be shy. Say hello, tell people your name, and ask questions. How do you do? I am happy you are all here. Now, let us start the meeting.

extra_audio.text: Hello, everyone. My name is Maisa. I am from Sao Paulo. This is my colleague, Paula. Pleased to meet you all.
